items.title: Optimize Title Tags and Meta Descriptions for Better CTR
items.description: Rewrite title tags for top-ranking pages to include compelling value propositions and emotional triggers. Focus on aged lead pages ranking 8-11 with titles like 'Get High-Converting Aged IUL Leads - Same Day Delivery' instead of generic titles. A/B test meta descriptions with specific benefits and urgency.
items.expectedImpact: Increase CTR from 0.15% to 0.25-0.35%, potentially doubling organic traffic

items.title: Create Comprehensive IUL Lead Buying Guide
items.description: Develop a pillar page targeting 'how to buy IUL leads' that consolidates all IUL-related content. Include comparison tables, pricing guides, vendor reviews, and conversion tips. Link all existing IUL pages to this comprehensive resource.
items.expectedImpact: Capture more long-tail IUL queries and increase average session duration by 30-40%

items.title: Investigate Direct Traffic Attribution and Quality
items.description: Audit the 124 direct sessions to determine if they're genuine direct visits or misattributed traffic. Check for missing UTM parameters, referrer issues, or bot traffic. Implement enhanced tracking to better understand the source of this traffic surge.
items.expectedImpact: Better traffic attribution and potential identification of new traffic sources worth optimizing

items.title: Optimize Page Load Speed and Above-Fold Content
items.description: With session duration at only 44.4 seconds, immediately audit page load times and optimize above-the-fold content to better match search intent. Focus on the homepage and top landing pages with clear value propositions within 3 seconds.
items.expectedImpact: Increase session duration by 30-50% and reduce bounce rate to under 65%

items.title: Implement Internal Linking Strategy for Lead Lifecycle Content
items.description: Create topic clusters around lead management, sales processes, and CRM systems. Add contextual internal links between related pages like lead lifecycle management (ranking position 3.7) and CRM comparison pages to distribute link equity and improve user flow.
items.expectedImpact: Reduce bounce rate to 60% and increase pages per session by 25%

items.title: Develop Aged Lead Pricing Calculator Tool
items.description: Build an interactive calculator that helps users estimate ROI on aged leads based on close rates, lead age, and industry. Target the query 'aged lead pricing guide' where you already rank well (position 4.9).
items.expectedImpact: Increase engagement rate to 45% and generate 20-30 new backlinks from industry sites

items.title: Expand IUL and Life Insurance Lead Content
items.description: Capitalize on strong performance of IUL content by creating additional pages targeting 'best iul leads,' 'iul lead generation,' and 'iul lead conversion tips.' The current page ranks at position 6.7 and shows commercial intent.
items.expectedImpact: Capture additional 50-100 monthly clicks from high-intent IUL-related queries

items.title: Improve Title Tags and Meta Descriptions for CTR
items.description: With CTR doubling to 0.36%, there's momentum to push higher. Optimize titles for pages ranking 15-30 positions to include power words, numbers, and clear value propositions. Focus on mortgage and insurance lead pages.
items.expectedImpact: Increase overall CTR to 0.5%+ and gain additional 5-10 daily clicks

items.title: Create Internal Linking Strategy from High-Traffic Pages
items.description: The homepage receives 50 views but has a high bounce rate. Add strategic internal links to relevant lead buying guides and sales process content to distribute traffic and increase page depth.
items.expectedImpact: Reduce homepage bounce rate by 15% and increase pages per session

items.title: Optimize for Voice Search and AI Queries
items.description: Add FAQ sections targeting conversational queries like 'what are the best aged insurance leads' and 'how much do IUL leads cost'. Structure content to answer specific questions that AI tools and voice assistants can easily extract.
items.expectedImpact: Capture 15-20% more traffic from AI referrals and voice search queries

items.title: Develop Mobile-Specific Content Strategy
items.description: Mobile accounts for only 6 clicks vs 12 desktop clicks despite mobile-first indexing. Optimize mobile experience and create mobile-specific content formats for lead generation topics.
items.expectedImpact: Increase mobile search clicks by 50% within 60 days
